title: AI-vs-expert benchmark rating export (synthetic template)
description: One record per (reviewer, item) rating. Lock this schema before collecting ratings. All example values are illustrative placeholders, not real data.

reviewer_id.description: Stable pseudonymous id for the reviewer (no personal identifiers).

reviewer_metadata.description: Captured once per reviewer; repeated here for convenience.

arm.description: Which system produced the rated output, or the human-expert reference arm.

probe_arm.description: Non-null when this is a planted control item.

order_index.description: Position in this reviewer's randomized item order (for fatigue analysis).

ratings.description: One score per decoupled rubric dimension.

justification.description: Free text, judged standalone; no cross-item references.

follow_up.description: What additional evidence would change the rating.

judge_type.description: Whether the rater is a human expert or an LLM-as-judge arm.

timing_seconds.description: Time spent on this item, for fatigue/drift analysis.
